ham.subject: Ticket #1234 Resolved – Next Steps
ham.body:
Hello Team,

I am pleased to inform you that the issue regarding the authentication failure in the production environment has been fixed. The changes have been merged into the main branch and a new build has been deployed.

Next Steps:
- Deploy the new build to your staging environment.
- Run the regression tests.
- If everything passes, proceed with the production rollout.

Please let me know if you encounter any further issues.

Thanks,
Rahul Sharma
Backend Engineer

spam.subject: Important: Your Income Tax Refund Pending – Take Immediate Action
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We regret to inform you that your Income Tax Return for the year 2023 has not yet been processed. As per the latest regulations, the pending refund amount of ₹2,50,000 is due to be credited to your bank account. However, due to incomplete details, the refund has been delayed.

To expedite the process, please verify your account details at <URL> and submit the required documents within the next 48 hours. Failure to do so may result in a penalty of ₹5,000 and disallowance of the refund.

For any queries, contact the Income Tax Department at 1800-123-456.

Best Regards,
Income Tax Department

Note: This is an official communication from the Income Tax Department. Do not ignore this message.
